name: Legends Draft Haus & Sports Bar
address: 2118 Harrison Dr Suite B, Clinton, IA 52732
about: Legends Draft Haus & Sports Bar is a multifaceted venue in Clinton, IA, combining a sports bar with golf simulators, a pool hall, and event space. It has operated for over a decade, positioning itself as a large, clean, and modern facility in Eastern Iowa. The venue is known for its authentic bar food and extensive beverage selection, including 31 craft beers, cocktails, and wine. It offers a unique environment for social gatherings, competitive play, and post-game celebrations, catering to both local residents and visitors with a focus on community and entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient combination of golf simulation and post-game dining and drinks
Family-friendly environment suitable for casual players and group outings
Availability for tournaments and leagues, adding a competitive element

food_and_drink.notes: Large menu with appetizers, entrees, wings, pizzas, and baskets; in-house and DoorDash ordering available
Full bar with 31 craft beers, tall boys, cocktails, and wine; no outside alcohol permitted

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies. It is recommended to call ahead to inquire about equipment availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food is allowed for an additional fee, but all alcohol must be purchased at the bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18 holes. Session duration may depend on booking and availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Legends Sports Bar advertises itself as a family-friendly environment and hosts events like birthdays and family reunions.
